name: composer-swarm
description: Add fast, low-cost Composer worker teams to Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run fast local Composer teams from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Composer Swarm lets Codex use fast local Cursor/Composer workers for broader code search, extra reasoning, candidate patches, verification, and explicit-approval apply.
defaultPrompt: Use Composer Swarm to fix this bug.
